modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User needs assistance resetting Chrome to default settings.

full_description_text:  
The user is looking to reset their Chrome browser to its default settings. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this process. This issue may be affecting their browsing experience, and they need guidance on how to proceed.
short_description: User needs assistance resetting Chrome to default settings.
description: The user is looking to reset their Chrome browser to its default settings. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this process. This issue may be affecting their browsing experience, and they need guidance on how to proceed.
